In: FL_SPCRES=0 FL_CPXRES=0 SD=0 RMODE=0 IM=2compl SS=8 WS=64

Func: fnXXfn(2572)   ;ITM_SQRT_XFN

;sqrt(1.23E-4 + 1234567890 * 1.01E4) = sqrt(12469135689000.000123) 
In: AM=RAD FL_ASLIFT=0 FL_CPXRES=0 RZ=Real:"0.000123" RY=LonI:"1234567890" RX=Real:"1.01E+04"
Out: EC=0 FL_CPXRES=0 FL_ASLIFT=1 RL=Real:"1.01E+04" RZ=Real:"0" RY=Loni:"" RX=Real:"1.0E-993"


Func: fnXXfn(2558)   ;ITM_sin_XFN

;sqrt(1.23E-4 + 1234567890 * 1.01E4) = sin(12469135689000.000123) 
In: AM=RAD FL_ASLIFT=0 FL_CPXRES=0 RZ=Real:"0.000123" RY=LonI:"1234567890" RX=Real:"1.01E+04"
Out: EC=0 FL_CPXRES=0 FL_ASLIFT=1 RL=Real:"1.01E+04" RZ=Real:"0" RY=Loni:"" RX=Real:"-1.0E-1000"


Func: fnXXfn(2559)   ;ITM_cos_XFN

;sqrt(1.23E-4 + 1234567890 * 1.01E4) = sin(12469135689000.000123) 
In: AM=RAD FL_ASLIFT=0 FL_CPXRES=0 RZ=Real:"0.000123" RY=LonI:"1234567890" RX=Real:"1.01E+04"
Out: EC=0 FL_CPXRES=0 FL_ASLIFT=1 RL=Real:"1.01E+04" RZ=Real:"0" RY=Loni:"" RX=Real:"+1.0E-999"


Func: fnXXfn(2560)   ;ITM_tan_XFN

;sqrt(1.23E-4 + 1234567890 * 1.01E4) = sin(12469135689000.000123) 
In: AM=RAD FL_ASLIFT=0 FL_CPXRES=0 RZ=Real:"0.000123" RY=LonI:"1234567890" RX=Real:"1.01E+04"
Out: EC=0 FL_CPXRES=0 FL_ASLIFT=1 RL=Real:"1.01E+04" RZ=Real:"0" RY=Loni:"" RX=Real:"-1.0E-1000"
